confirm-dialog.title: Are you sure?
confirm-dialog.description: Leaving this flow will not save your data.

sms.title-without-phone: Enter the 6-digit code sent to your phone.

success.title: Success
success.description: We sent you a new code.

resend-button.disabled: Please wait {{seconds}} seconds to resend it...

config-invalid.title: Integration incorrectly configured
config-invalid.subtitle: It seems like the Verify with Footprint integration is using an invalid integration key. Please contact the owner of this website.

sandbox-outcome.title: Select test outcome
sandbox-outcome.subtitle: Select the outcome you want to test.

manual-review.title: Manual review

test-id.label: Test ID
test-id.hint: Test ID helps you create different user onboardings with your email and phone number. Do not use spaces or #.

error.title: Oops! An error occurred.
error.description: We're sorry. Please restart the onboarding.

complete.title: Submission completed!
complete.subtitle-with-kyb: Thanks for using Footprint to verify your business and your identity.
complete.subtitle: Thanks for using Footprint to verify your identity.
